name: Clerk
description: Clerk — Identity / Auth / User Management tool for developers

seo.title: Clerk Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Clerk analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Identity / Auth / User Management.

lock_in.explanation: Medium — pre-built toby creat deep integration, but by towithby  free

when_to_use: Next.js / React apps needing drop-in auth UI
Startup wanting generous free tier (50K MAU)
when_not_to_use: Enterprise requiring SAML/SCIM on day one — Auth0/WorkOS
Need self-hosted auth — FusionAuth or Keycloak

migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: Medium — pre-built toby creat deep integration, but by towithby  free
migration_cheatsheet.tip: Moderate effort required. Export data before canceling

review.verdict: Best for next.js / react apps needing drop-in auth ui. Clerk offers freemium, paid from $25/mo (Pro, 10K MAU). Moderate vendor lock-in.
pros: Next.js / React apps needing drop-in auth UI
Startup wanting generous free tier (50K MAU)
Wide range of social login and MFA options
cons: Enterprise requiring SAML/SCIM on day one — Auth0/WorkOS
Need self-hosted auth — FusionAuth or Keycloak
review.not_for: Enterprise requiring SAML/SCIM on day one
